name: MMLU-Pro
description: Harder multi-task knowledge and reasoning benchmark (10-choice questions across 14 domains).

name: GPQA Diamond
description: Graduate-level, Google-proof science questions (hardest split). PhD experts score ~65%.

name: SWE-bench Verified
description: Real GitHub issues resolved end-to-end in real repositories; the standard agentic coding benchmark.

name: AIME (latest)
description: American Invitational Mathematics Examination — competition math, no tools unless noted.

name: Humanity's Last Exam
description: 2,500 expert-written frontier questions across dozens of fields; designed to resist saturation.

name: LMArena Elo
description: Crowd-sourced head-to-head preference rating from LMArena (formerly Chatbot Arena).

name: ARC-AGI-2
description: Abstraction-and-reasoning puzzles that are easy for humans and hard for models.
